  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Severe water hammer (hydraulic shock) occurs immediately after the fixture valve closes.",
    "Lack of adequate pipe securing or missing water hammer arrestor."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an ASSE 1010 certified water hammer arrestor close to the fast-closing valve.",
    "Inspect and secure loose PEX or copper piping with proper hangers and straps to prevent movement."
  ],
  "rationale": "The audio recording clearly captures a fast-closing valve followed by a loud, metallic banging sound characteristic of water hammer. This hydraulic shock can damage joints, fittings, and appliances over time, violating standard plumbing practices regarding piping support and shock absorption.",
  "references": [
    "IPC Section 604.9 (Water hammer)",
    "UPC Section 609.10 (Water Hammer Arrestors)"
  ]
}
